response.original_title: Counting the days until I'm away from my mother.
response.overview: There are films that don't need excessive drama to still captivate viewers when the lights come on. Kim Tae-yong's *Counting the Days Until Mother's Departure* is one such example. The film chooses a slow, simple storytelling approach, focusing on small things like family meals, yet it evokes many thoughts about time and separation.
response.title: Counting the days until I'm away from my mother.
